keywords.name: Not that I like to talk to you, but I am Elathriel Shadowslayer.
keywords.job: I am the leader of the Kuridai and the Az'irel of Ab'dendriel. Humans would call it sheriff, executioner, or avenger.
keywords.sheriff: Sometimes people get imprisoned for some time. True criminals will be cast out and for comitting the worst crimes offenders are thrown into the hellgate.
keywords.executioner: Sometimes people get imprisoned for some time. True criminals will be cast out and for comitting the worst crimes offenders are thrown into the hellgate.
keywords.avenger: Sometimes people get imprisoned for some time. True criminals will be cast out and for comitting the worst crimes offenders are thrown into the hellgate.
keywords.hellgate: It was here among other structures, like the depot tower, before our people came here. It's secured by a sealed door.
keywords.door: For safety we keep the door to the hellgate locked all times. I have the keys to open it when needed.
keywords.sealed: For safety we keep the door to the hellgate locked all times. I have the keys to open it when needed.
keywords.carlin: We watch this city and the actions of its inhabitants closely.
keywords.thais: The thain kingdom and we share some enemys, so its only logical to cooperate in a few areas.
keywords.venore: The merchants of venore provide us with some usefull goods. Still I an convinced that they get more out of our bargain then we do.
keywords.roderick: He is tolerated here as the spokesman of the thaian king.
keywords.olrik: This human is too unimportant to be even mentioned.
keywords.king: It's hard for some of my people to grasp the true concept of a strong leader.
keywords.tibianus: A human weakling, not much more.
keywords.eloise: A human weakling, not much more.
keywords.elves: My people are divided in castes in these times, until they comprehend that only the way of the Kuridai can save us all.
keywords.dwarfs: We might use the shelter earth and hills provide us, but their obsession for metal is a waste of time.
keywords.humans: They are useful ... and better stay useful.
keywords.troll: Like all inferior races they can be at least used for something good. The other castes are just jealous about our use of them.
keywords.army: It's one of the more useful concepts we can learn from the other races.
keywords.cenath: Arrogant bastards, but they wield quite powerful magics.
keywords.kuridai: We are the heart of the elven society. We forge, we build, and we don't allow our people to be pushed around.
keywords.deraisim: Confused cowards. With all their skill they still tend to hide and run. What a waste.
keywords.abdaisim: Even more undecided then the deraisim.
keywords.teshial: Dreamers are of no practical use. I don't mourn their demise.
keywords.ferumbras: Even if he'd walk through the town above the other castes won't see the necessity to follow OUR way.
keywords.crunor: I have no use for the treething. I worship Mortiur, the ravager, of course.
keywords.mortiur: The celestial paladin of revenge. He was one of the greatest elven wariors of all times.
keywords.news: News are confidential and not your business.
keywords.magic: I mastered some spells of battle.
keywords.druid: Druids' magic is too peaceful for my taste.
keywords.sorcerer: I have seen human sorcerers doing some impressive things ... before they died.
keywords.spell: I teach the spells 'Light Magic Missile', 'Heavy Magic Missile', 'Fireball', 'Great Fireball', 'Fire Bomb', and 'Explosion'.
keywords.light: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.missile: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.heavy: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.fireball: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.great: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.fire: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.bomb: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.explosion: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.

texts: I am the leader of the Kuridai and the Az'irel of Ab'dendriel. Humans would call it sheriff, executioner, or avenger.

entries.response: Come back when you have enough money.
Believe me, it's better for you that way.
You need to advance to magic level %A to learn this spell.
You do not have enough gold to pay my services.
From now on you can cast this spell.
